targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  ps.price              AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(as_of_date) AS day,
    ticker_id,
    MAX(as_of_date)  AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN holdings h         ON h.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id     -- << filter to holdings
JOIN tickers  t         ON t.id        = ps.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  ps.price              AS value
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN watchlist w       ON w.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND w.active = 1
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN tickers t          ON t.id        = d.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - h.avg_cost) / NULLIF(h.avg_cost, 0)) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN holdings h         ON h.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN tickers t          ON t.id        = d.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - bp.base_price) / NULLIF(bp.base_price, 0)) AS value
FROM (
  -- daily roll-up: last snapshot each day per ticker
  SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN watchlist w         ON w.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND w.active = 1
JOIN tickers   t         ON t.id        = d.ticker_id
JOIN price_snapshots ps  ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN (
  -- per-ticker baseline = price on the first day in the range (using that day’s last snapshot)
  SELECT b.ticker_id, ps1.price AS base_price
  FROM (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(day) AS first_day
    FROM (
      SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
      GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
    ) dd
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) b
  JOIN (
    SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
  ) d1 ON d1.ticker_id = b.ticker_id AND d1.day = b.first_day
  JOIN price_snapshots ps1 ON ps1.ticker_id = d1.ticker_id AND ps1.as_of_date = d1.last_ts
) bp ON bp.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  h.quantity * (ps.price - pb.base_price) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN holdings h          ON h.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
JOIN tickers  t          ON t.id        = d.ticker_id
JOIN price_snapshots ps  ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN (
  SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price AS base_price
  FROM (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS base_ts
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) b
  JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id = b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date = b.base_ts
) pb ON pb.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  (ps.price - pb.base_price) AS value
FROM (
  -- last snapshot each day per ticker within range
  SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN watchlist w         ON w.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND w.active = 1
JOIN tickers   t         ON t.id        = d.ticker_id
JOIN price_snapshots ps  ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN (
  -- baseline = FIRST snapshot inside the time range per ticker
  SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price AS base_price
  FROM (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS base_ts
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) b
  JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id = b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date = b.base_ts
) pb ON pb.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  100.0 * ( (ps.price - pb.base_price) / NULLIF(pb.base_price, 0) ) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN holdings h          ON h.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
JOIN tickers  t          ON t.id        = d.ticker_id
JOIN price_snapshots ps  ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN (
  SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price AS base_price
  FROM (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS base_ts
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) b
  JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id = b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date = b.base_ts
) pb ON pb.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

panels.title: Percentage Gains Holdings in Time Range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  100.0 * ( (ps.price - pb.base_price) / NULLIF(pb.base_price, 0) ) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN watchlist w         ON w.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND w.active = 1
JOIN tickers   t         ON t.id        = d.ticker_id
JOIN price_snapshots ps  ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN (
  SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price AS base_price
  FROM (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS base_ts
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) b
  JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id = b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date = b.base_ts
) pb ON pb.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

panels.title: Percentage Gains Watching in Time Range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day)                   AS time_sec,
  t.symbol                                AS metric,
  h.quantity * (ps.price - h.avg_cost)    AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(as_of_date) AS day,
    ticker_id,
    MAX(as_of_date)  AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN holdings h         ON h.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id
JOIN tickers  t         ON t.id        = ps.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol              AS metric,
  ps.price - pb.base_price AS value
FROM (
  -- last snapshot per day (still constrained by dashboard time window for display)
  SELECT DATE(as_of_date) AS day, ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE $__timeFilter(as_of_date)   -- optional: keeps the plotted range fast
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN watchlist w        ON w.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND w.active = 1
JOIN tickers   t        ON t.id        = d.ticker_id
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN (
  -- all-time baseline: very first snapshot ever for each ticker
  SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price AS base_price
  FROM (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS base_ts
    FROM price_snapshots
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) b
  JOIN price_snapshots p
    ON p.ticker_id = b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date = b.base_ts
) pb ON pb.ticker_id = d.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  h.quantity * (ps.price - h.avg_cost) AS '$stock gains'
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(ps.as_of_date) AS day,
    MAX(ps.as_of_date)  AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN tickers t ON t.id = ps.ticker_id
  WHERE t.symbol = '$stock'
    AND ps.as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND ps.as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY DATE(ps.as_of_date)
) d
JOIN tickers t        ON t.symbol = '$stock'
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = t.id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN holdings h         ON h.ticker_id = t.id
ORDER BY d.day;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  ps.price - pb.base_price AS '$stock gains in time range'
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(ps.as_of_date) AS day, MAX(ps.as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN tickers t ON t.id = ps.ticker_id
  WHERE t.symbol = '$stock'
    AND ps.as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND ps.as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY DATE(ps.as_of_date)
) d
JOIN tickers t         ON t.symbol = '$stock'
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = t.id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN (
  SELECT t.id AS ticker_id, p.price AS base_price
  FROM tickers t
  JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id = t.id
  WHERE t.symbol = '$stock'
    AND p.as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND p.as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  ORDER BY p.as_of_date ASC
  LIMIT 1
) pb ON pb.ticker_id = t.id
ORDER BY d.day;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - h.avg_cost) / NULLIF(h.avg_cost, 0)) AS '$stock gains %'
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(ps.as_of_date) AS day, MAX(ps.as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN tickers t ON t.id = ps.ticker_id
  WHERE t.symbol = '$stock'
    AND ps.as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND ps.as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY DATE(ps.as_of_date)
) d
JOIN tickers t         ON t.symbol = '$stock'
JOIN holdings h        ON h.ticker_id = t.id
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = t.id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
ORDER BY d.day;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.day) AS time_sec,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - pb.base_price) / NULLIF(pb.base_price, 0)) AS '$stock gains percentage in time range'
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(ps.as_of_date) AS day, MAX(ps.as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN tickers t ON t.id = ps.ticker_id
  WHERE t.symbol = '$stock'
    AND ps.as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND ps.as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY DATE(ps.as_of_date)
) d
JOIN tickers t          ON t.symbol = '$stock'
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = t.id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN (
  SELECT t.id AS ticker_id, p.price AS base_price
  FROM tickers t
  JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id = t.id
  WHERE t.symbol = '$stock'
    AND p.as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND p.as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  ORDER BY p.as_of_date ASC
  LIMIT 1
) pb ON pb.ticker_id = t.id
ORDER BY d.day;

SELECT
  CAST(ps.as_of_date AS DATETIME) AS time,   -- ok in SELECT
  ps.price AS '$stock price'
FROM price_snapshots ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id = ps.ticker_id
WHERE t.symbol = '$stock'
  AND $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)           -- ← no CAST() here
ORDER BY time;

WITH s AS (
  SELECT
    ps.ticker_id,
    ps.as_of_date,
    ps.price,
    LAG(ps.price) OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ticker_id ORDER BY ps.as_of_date) AS prev_price
  FROM price_snapshots ps
),
pnl AS (
  SELECT
    s.as_of_date,
    h.quantity * (s.price - s.prev_price) AS daily_pnl
  FROM s
  JOIN holdings h ON h.ticker_id = s.ticker_id
)
SELECT
  CAST(as_of_date AS DATETIME) AS time,
  SUM(daily_pnl)               AS portfolio_daily_pnl
FROM pnl
WHERE $__timeFilter(as_of_date)
GROUP BY as_of_date
ORDER BY time;

list.definition:
SELECT
  t.symbol              AS metric
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(as_of_date) AS day,
    ticker_id,
    MAX(as_of_date)  AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN $status s       ON s.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id     -- << filter
JOIN tickers  t         ON t.id        = ps.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;
list.label: Stock
list.name: stock
list.query:
SELECT
  t.symbol              AS metric
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(as_of_date) AS day,
    ticker_id,
    MAX(as_of_date)  AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  WHERE as_of_date >= $__timeFrom() AND as_of_date <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY ticker_id, DATE(as_of_date)
) d
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id = d.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date = d.last_ts
JOIN $status s       ON s.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id     -- << filter
JOIN tickers  t         ON t.id        = ps.ticker_id
ORDER BY d.day, t.symbol;
